name: Eul's Scepter of Divinity
description: A mysterious scepter passed down through the ages, its disruptive winds can be used for good or evil.

abilities.name: Cyclone
abilities.description: Sweeps the caster up into a cyclone, applying a basic dispel, fully disabling them and turning them invulnerable for a short while. Cooldown: 23. Mana Cost: 175. Cast Range: 550. Duration: 2.5. Damage: 50. If the target is an enemy, they also take damage upon landing. Cannot lift up Roshan, instead, it instantly applies the damage.
